cases.name: happy_path_three_groups_named_archetypes
cases.prompt: Run map-competitive-arena on us-ambient-scribe-medtech, focal layer: vendor. Upstream size-market classification: Arena.

cases.name: rejects_single_group_analysis
cases.prompt: Run map-competitive-arena on a synthetic industry where the drafter places all firms into one strategic group (insufficient discrimination).

cases.name: rejects_missing_winner_archetype
cases.prompt: Run map-competitive-arena on a synthetic industry with 3 groups profiled but no winner archetype named per group.

cases.name: rejects_missing_mobility_barriers
cases.prompt: Run map-competitive-arena on a synthetic industry with 3 groups and winner archetypes but no mobility-barriers section.

cases.name: rejects_missing_2axis_viz
cases.prompt: Run map-competitive-arena on a synthetic industry where groups are listed but no 2-axis visualization (grid table or coordinate notation) is produced.

cases.name: negative_trigger_market_sizing
cases.prompt: How big is the US ambient-scribe medtech market?

cases.name: negative_trigger_moat_assessment
cases.prompt: What is Abridge's durable competitive advantage?
